Hello can you stop posting on my profile

cause_analysis.narrative: Afro Luxe Braiding Bar churned on 2026-03-31 after 125 days with Zoca. They sent an explicit cancellation request on 2026-02-28 via sms — 31 days before churn. Classification: explicit cancellation. The client formally asked to cancel; the question is whether a save attempt was made. 2 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days — this is the clearest operational failure on Zoca's side.
recommendations: [Retention] Cancellation was signalled 31 day(s) before churn via sms. Trigger an AM save call within 4 hours of any cancellation keyword — not a support response.
[Offer] Build a 3-tier retention offer ladder (pause / discount / scope change) so AMs have something concrete to counter with.
[SLA] 2 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days. Enforce a hard rule: every inbound gets a human response within 24h, every day of the week.
[SLA example] On 2026-04-02 via sms, client wrote: "You are messing up my website and my business…" — no outbound response in 30 days.
[SLA example] On 2026-04-02 via sms, client wrote: "Hello can you stop posting on my profile…" — no outbound response in 30 days.
